<blockquote>[[File:Doggy dash talent.gif|thumb|500x500px|Without Doggy Dash - With Doggy Dash]]Increases your Dog's movement speed. 



Every level grants a 12% increase.

Mastering it grants an additional 15% increase.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* It was added in the original DT.
* This talent is useful for combat (along with [[Black Pelt]] + [[Doggy Tools]]), and [[Wolf Mount]].
* Beware when controlling a speedy doggo, you might get yourself in sticky situations!
